pipeline_name: Automated Generation Protocol for Speech-First Digital Learning Materials
author: Teacher Chen-Wei Chien
target_llm_directives: This document is the definitive system prompt template for generating TTS-friendly, speech-recognition-optimized JSON databases for textbook learning materials. You must strictly follow the pipeline stages, principles, and filter logic defined below.

principles: TTS FRIENDLY: Standard English capitalization and punctuation added for natural pausing.
LOWERCASE: Stage 1 words are strictly lowercase.
SENTENCE CASE: Stage 2 sentences start with uppercase.
GRAMMAR FIXED: Added missing possessives (apostrophes) and commas.
NO MARKDOWN: Strictly forbid any markdown formatting (e.g., **, _) in the output arrays.
STRICT 1:1 MAPPING: Absolute parallel index mapping between stages.'1' and stages.'2'.

exclude: Derivative words or word families (e.g., if 'memorize' is the core word, exclude 'memory'). Only keep numbered core 'Words for Production'.
Easily confused monosyllabic words (e.g., pen, bus, cat, one, two).
Short words lacking distinct phonetic features (e.g., at, it, of, in).
Words with strong homophone interference (e.g., meat/meet, see/sea).
Pure numbers (e.g., eleven, thirty) - speech recognition often converts these to digits (11, 30), causing string comparison failures.
Phrases containing pure numbers (e.g., one's heart, one's mind).
include: Clear and sonorous disyllabic words (e.g., shoulder, tiger, market).
Structurally long yet simple words (e.g., afternoon, basketball).
Time- and frequency-related words (e.g., clock, future) as substitutes for numbers to improve recognition rates.

pipeline_stages.ai_execution_directives: 1. Extract the lesson title in the format 'Unit X: [Title Name]'. 2. Extract ONLY the numbered core words from the 'Words for Production' list. Strictly discard any unnumbered derivatives or word families. 3. Standardize the Chinese translation format by using spaces and slashes for multiple meanings (e.g., format '嚮導,導遊' as '嚮導 / 導遊').

Apply the 'filter_logic' rules to the extracted core vocabulary. Transform the retained words into an array of objects format: { 'en': 'word', 'zh': 'translation' }. All English text here MUST be strictly lowercase. Encapsulate this array within 'stages'.'1'.

Generate one standard English contextual sentence for each word from Stage 1. You MUST maintain strict 1:1 index mapping (e.g., stages.'1'[5] must correspond to stages.'2'[5]). Apply 'principles' (Sentence case, grammar fixing, NO markdown). Sentences must adapt perfectly to TTS engines for natural intonation and breathing pauses. Encapsulate this pure string array within 'stages'.'2'.

pipeline_stages.purpose: Transform the speech learning materials into an optimized database structure that facilitates speech recognition, string comparison, and TTS playback on front-end websites.
pipeline_stages.ai_execution_directives: Construct the final JSON for the unit. Ensure the top-level of the final output always retains the '_notes' object (containing the exact principles and filter_logic defined above). Ensure the generated lesson data (title, stages) is properly nested under its corresponding lesson node (e.g., 'L1'). To maintain data transmission efficiency, all leaf objects (word objects and sentence arrays) must be outputted in a single-line (minified) compact format.
